title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition
summary: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition
briefing: The new unit arrives amid rapid growth in tokenized assets, with Franklin Templeton's onchain product suite expanding from roughly $768 million to more than $2.5 billion over the past year.

title: New York, Maryland and Utah to hold primaries with crypto PAC money hanging over voters
summary: New York, Maryland and Utah to hold primaries with crypto PAC money hanging over voters
briefing: Crypto-backed PACs disclosed spending more than $8 million on media to support candidates in three US states, as some Maryland Democrats have called on one candidate to reject “outside spending from crypto billionaires.”

title: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
summary: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
briefing: Solana captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes as analysts debate whether $60 was the bottom for SOL.

title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
summary: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
briefing: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
summary: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
briefing: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.

title: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop toward 16-week low
summary: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop toward 16-week low
briefing: Bitcoin sought a breakout toward a potential BTC price target near $70,000 as Iran news sent oil toward its lowest levels since early March.

title: Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk
summary: Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk
briefing: Think your wallet is safe? A major crypto risk may start with a Google search and one wrong click.

title: Comparing Bitcoin Giant Strategy to Terra Luna Is a STRC, Benchmark Says
summary: Comparing Bitcoin Giant Strategy to Terra Luna Is a STRC, Benchmark Says
briefing: The analysts underscored that Strategy's Stretch (STRC) can't technically lose its “peg.”

title: BitMine, Sharplink, Joe Lubin Back New Ethereum Research and Development Lab
summary: BitMine, Sharplink, Joe Lubin Back New Ethereum Research and Development Lab
briefing: Some of Ethereum's largest holders are coming together to fund a new research and development lab aimed at boosting the network and ETH.

title: Trump Orders Acceleration of Quantum Readiness as Bitcoin Faces Coming Risk
summary: Trump Orders Acceleration of Quantum Readiness as Bitcoin Faces Coming Risk
briefing: President Donald Trump signed two executive orders aimed at expanding U.S. quantum computing capabilities and speeding the transition to quantum-resistant encryption.

title: Google Warns AI Consciousness Debate Could Become a Political Battleground
summary: Google Warns AI Consciousness Debate Could Become a Political Battleground
briefing: A new paper from Google DeepMind argues that disagreements over whether AI is conscious could spill into politics, law, and public institutions.

title: Crypto Industry Urges Congress to Pass Tax Bill—But Will It Happen This Year?
summary: Crypto Industry Urges Congress to Pass Tax Bill—But Will It Happen This Year?
briefing: A bill that would make crypto mining and staking more attractive is a top priority for industry leaders—and a growing concern for House Democrats.

title: Ethereum MEV Bot JaredFromSubway Threatens Legal Action After $7.5 Million Loss
summary: Ethereum MEV Bot JaredFromSubway Threatens Legal Action After $7.5 Million Loss
briefing: The well-known trading bot took a hit this weekend after it fell victim to a series of transactions that left its logic exposed.

title: ICE and OKX Are Teaming Up to Bring Tokenized Securities to Wall Street
summary: ICE and OKX Are Teaming Up to Bring Tokenized Securities to Wall Street
briefing: The pair will focus on advancing tokenization and digital asset infrastructure in a joint venture co-chaired by the former governor of New York.

title: The Studio Behind 'Ex Machina' Is Now Researching AI With Google
summary: The Studio Behind 'Ex Machina' Is Now Researching AI With Google
briefing: Google is investing $75 million in A24 as part of a new AI research initiative focused on filmmaking tools.
